title: Freeze r6a source evidence and issue the EPE/phi_R amendment
description: Bind the immutable r6a source and evidence artifacts, then document c100 scope, the U_ds/EPE generation boundary, the frozen phi_R sign inconsistency, Beauty test-only disclosure, and E7 not-estimable status.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN the dated manifest and memo are written THEN every source/E1/RISK-03/RISK-04/RISK-05/r6a queue/result input has a path and SHA-256; WHEN phi_R is recorded THEN Beauty is 1.0/0.1366311174092942/0.0 and Steam is 1.0/0.05808110271503808/0.0; WHEN c100 is described THEN best-summary byte identity is separated from checkpoint identity and spontaneous u_tilde collapse is explicitly withdrawn; HARD STOP: do not modify any frozen r6a byte; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-12-aaai27-r7-atomic-repair-design.md:67
review_initial_requirements: Check all cited paths/hashes against live read-only server evidence and distinguish artifact fact, implementation inference, and manuscript interpretation.
review_regression_requirements: Recompute manifest hashes; verify the memo says phi_R is increasing in observed EPE for the frozen values despite the parent non-increasing-risk text; verify E7 remains not_estimable and no FPM rerun is proposed.

title: Repair anchor-only gate-source selection with seven regression checks
description: Add exactly one dataset-scale override of 1.0 to every anchor-only argv and leave production model/text_side.py unchanged.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN the adapter builds the E1-pass matrix THEN all six anchor argv have exactly one text_side.gate_dataset_scale_override=1.0 and no utility-report token; WHEN a clean-phi-zero proposal fixture runs THEN g equals g_max, final proposal differs from p_core, and final proposal equals the fixed anchor mixture; WHEN full c100 and global_p run THEN each still returns p_core exactly; WHEN regressions run THEN the existing E1 and queue contracts remain green; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-12-aaai27-r7-atomic-repair-design.md:81
review_initial_requirements: Reproduce the r6a anchor failure and the post-mixture closed-gate overwrite from the frozen source; observe the new final-proposal test fail before editing the adapter.
review_regression_requirements: Run the seven dated checks plus test_r6_launch_contract, test_risk04_08_queue_safe_adapters, test_text_side_proposal, and E1/global-p regressions; verify model/text_side.py SHA is unchanged.

title: Implement fail-closed pilot task wrapper and per-run artifact manifests
description: Stream child output into nonempty run and queue logs and emit a provenance-bound passing artifact manifest only after successful summary validation.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN a wrapped child succeeds THEN run-local single_train.log is nonempty and artifact_manifest.json binds task/queue/source/config/split/bank/summary/log/evaluator/selector/null-reference provenance with hashes; WHEN a child fails or summary/log/hash validation fails THEN wrapper exits nonzero and no passing artifact manifest exists; WHEN an evidence arm runs THEN null_curve_reference_policy is frozen_clean_calibration with clean-source-bank and current-embedding hashes; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-12-aaai27-r7-atomic-repair-design.md:103
review_initial_requirements: Write failing real-subprocess tests for zero-byte logs, nonfinite/missing summaries, child failure, path escape, and absent provenance before implementing the wrapper.
review_regression_requirements: Run wrapper unit/integration tests with a real temporary child process; validate artifact self hashes through the production RISK-08 validator; verify queue success artifacts require both summary and artifact manifest.

title: Freeze artifact-derived pilot report and RISK-08 finalizer
description: Build the fourteen-artifact pilot report and replay the original frozen response criteria without hand-entered metrics or rescue discretion.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN fourteen passing artifacts are supplied THEN the report contains validation/test HR@10 and NDCG@10 for every arm, host-relative deltas, frozen EPE/phi_R, every preregistered condition, and one deterministic phenomenon_pass; WHEN any artifact/value/hash is missing or nonfinite THEN report generation fails closed or phenomenon_pass is false with reasons retained; WHEN the report is valid THEN run_risk08_decision accepts it from the same queue root; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-12-aaai27-r7-atomic-repair-design.md:128
review_initial_requirements: Check the exact frozen RISK-05 predictions, rho threshold, adjacent tolerance, worst-delta rule, and all-fourteen identity binding before writing decision code.
review_regression_requirements: Test PASS and each independent failure condition using artifact-derived fixtures; verify metrics cannot enter directly, Spearman uses all six anchor points, failed values remain visible, and the original no-rescue RISK-08 validator emits at most one exit.

title: Build and validate the dated r7 source and atomic queue
description: Deploy the reviewed patch into a new source snapshot and generate a hash-bound queue with fourteen active E1-pass tasks and an explicit GPU 0/1 allowlist.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN the r7 bundle is built THEN source and queue roots are new dated absent paths, 14 E1-pass tasks and 8 inactive fail-branch tasks validate, seed is 100, six anchor overrides are 1.0, six full overrides retain frozen phi_R, two hosts retain learned-v2 identity, and every task requires summary plus artifact manifest; WHEN dry-run/smoke executes THEN no training starts; HARD STOP: any source/ledger/protocol/hash mismatch or write into r6a aborts launch; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-12-aaai27-r7-atomic-repair-design.md:148
review_initial_requirements: Compare the staged source against the r6a snapshot and reviewed patch; verify no unapproved production-model or numerical-protocol diff exists.
review_regression_requirements: Run manifest validation, controller validate, dry-run, smoke, task-count/argv/hash assertions, GPU-busy simulation, and frozen-root before/after hash audit; record the exact deploy/source/queue manifest SHA-256 values.
notes: source_doc:docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-12-aaai27-r7-atomic-repair-design.md; prerequisite:P0-0,P0-1,P0-2,P0-3; gpu_ids:0,1; active_runs:14; seed:100; picked_reason:P0-4 is the final no-training deployment gate before the resident controller may be armed

title: Arm the resident r7 controller and auto-close the original RISK-08 gate
description: Start a detached controller that waits for truly free L20 cards, runs one task per card, and finalizes the artifact-derived report and original RISK-08 gate after all active tasks pass.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN both GPUs contain root compute PIDs THEN no r7 training PID starts; WHEN either GPU becomes empty THEN at most one r7 training process starts on that card and the other occupied card is untouched; WHEN all fourteen tasks pass THEN the finalizer creates pilot_report.json and invokes run_risk08_decision in the same queue root; WHEN any task/log/artifact fails THEN execution remains fail-closed and no rescue task is added; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-12-aaai27-r7-atomic-repair-design.md:167
review_initial_requirements: Check tmux/controller liveness, physical/logical GPU binding, process ownership, one-process-per-card, queue-root containment, and finalizer prerequisites before detaching.
review_regression_requirements: After launch, query fresh controller status, nvidia-smi compute PIDs, task records, logs, source/queue hashes, and stop_requested; after completion verify 14/14 manifests and the immutable RISK-08 exit. Until GPU release, record waiting_external_gpu without claiming training has started.

title: Integrate the dated method scope and deadline gates into the paper and runbook
description: Separate U_ds discovery, RISK-03 exposure measurement, and phi_R reliability-scale intervention; enforce c100 and Beauty disclosure boundaries and the 7/16 and 7/18 downgrade rules.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN paper-facing text is updated THEN U_ds/EPE/phi_R generations are distinct, the frozen sign inconsistency is disclosed, c100 is explicit scale-zero fallback, Beauty val/test are colocated, SASRec and its Beauty anomaly are annotated, DiffuRec is absent from confirmatory comparison, validation-only selection plus development test logging is stated, and every seed-100 outcome is a single-run observation; WHEN 7/16 or 7/18 gates arrive THEN the documented downgrade rule is mechanically applicable; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-12-aaai27-r7-atomic-repair-design.md:181
review_initial_requirements: Audit every affected abstract/method/experiment/caption/reproducibility claim against the dated evidence memo before editing; do not insert unfinished r7 numbers.
review_regression_requirements: Search the paper and runbooks for withdrawn u_tilde-collapse, unconditional 4/4, risk-gated efficacy, significant/stable/equivalent/within-noise, DiffuRec-confirmatory, untouched-test, and Beauty test-only reporting; compile the manuscript or record an exact limited-validation reason.

title: Review r7 repair and evidence claims against the approved design
description: Use an independent same-model review to compare the approved r7 design with delivered code, server artifacts, CSV state, validation evidence, paper wording, and claim/evidence levels.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN P0-0 through P0-6 are closed or honestly marked with external-state limitations THEN review the source-specific claims: anchor proposal is non-core under override 1.0, full c100 remains exact core, no task passes with an empty log, every RISK-08 input is same-root artifact-derived, frozen phi_R sign inconsistency is disclosed, Beauty val/test are colocated, and no r7/r6a single-run result is overstated; WHEN gaps are found THEN append follow-up rows and REVIEW-02; WHEN no gaps remain THEN close the CSV; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-12-aaai27-r7-atomic-repair-design.md:1
review_initial_requirements: Verify all prior non-review rows are closed or all remaining work is an explicitly recorded external-GPU/result dependency before running this review.
review_regression_requirements: Run same-model independent review against the approved design, exact diff/commits, test outputs, remote manifests/logs, RISK-08 artifacts, paper wording, and the seven source-specific claim/evidence checks; low-level fixtures must not be described as production completion.
